name: Random Follow-up
description: Creates one or more random follow-up dates within a set interval, enforcing a minimum gap between them.

project-settings.name: Enable Random Follow-up
project-settings.description: Enable random follow-up date generation for this project

project-settings.name: Start Date Field
project-settings.description: Field that contains the start date (e.g., enrolment date).

project-settings.name: Event Date Field (Optional)
project-settings.description: If configured, this field becomes mandatory and will be used as the base date.

project-settings.name: Minimum Days
project-settings.description: Minimum number of days after base date.

project-settings.name: Maximum Days
project-settings.description: Maximum number of days after base date.

project-settings.name: Minimum gap between random follow-ups (days)
project-settings.description: Ensures random follow-up dates are at least this many days apart (e.g., 30 ~ 1 month).

project-settings.name: Random follow-up slots
project-settings.description: Define one or more follow-up date fields to populate. Each slot becomes one random follow-up.

sub_settings.name: Follow-up date field
sub_settings.description: Date field to store the random follow-up date for this slot.

sub_settings.name: Label (optional)
sub_settings.description: Internal label for this slot (e.g., 'Random FU #1').
